chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1594 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 16.10.2025 Mr. Ahmed Hussain Jokhio, Advocate for Applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh ************ Learned Counsel for Applicant submits that the Applicant has been acquitted by the learned Trial Court; therefore, he does not press this Criminal Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Qurban
